model_name: Name of the model. TYPE: string. DEFAULT: 'analog_bits'.

model_id: Unique id of the model. Replaces [key] with the key as a string. Replaces * with a unique identifer. TYPE: str. DEFAULT: '[model_name]_*'.
save_path: Path to save the model. TYPE: str. DEFAULT: ''.
seed: Seed for random number generator. TYPE: non-negative integer or -1 (random). DEFAULT: -1.
training_history: Variable for storing training history. TYPE: str. DEFAULT: ''.
origin: Variable for storing arguments which differed wrt. defaults and their tier/values. TYPE: str. DEFAULT: ''.
ckpt_name: Path to load ckpt from. Empty string for ckpt_name='./saves/ver-*/*[model_name]*/ckpt_*.pt'. TYPE: DEFAULT: '' .
mode: Which mode to run in? new: new training, cont: continue from ckpt, load: load ckpt and make new TYPE: One of ['new','cont','load']. DEFAULT: 'new'.

noise_schedule: Which noise schedule? TYPE: One of: ['linear','cosine','linear_simple']. DEFAULT: cosine.
schedule_sampler: Which strategy for timestep sampling to use for the schedule? TYPE: One of: ['uniform','low_discrepency','uniform_low_d']. DEFAULT: uniform_low_d.
input_scale: Input scaling factor, where 1.0 is no scaling and lower values towards 0 induce noisier schedules. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 0.1.
logsnr_min: Minimum value for logsnr. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: -20.0.
logsnr_max: Maximum value for logsnr. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 20.0.
var_type: Which type of variance to use? TYPE: One of ['large','small','log_linear_[float]']. DEFAULT: 'large'.

channel_multiplier: Channel multipliers for the UNet, specifying the number of layers and their multiplier with num_channels. TYPE: comma separated list of ints. DEFAULT: 'auto'.
dropout: UNet dropout probability. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 0.0.
predict: How to parmeterize x_t. TYPE: One of ['x','v','eps','both','p','p_logits']. DEFAULT: 'x'.
use_scale_shift_norm: Should scaling and shifting of normalization layers be be used for class conditioning? otherwise simply linear addition. TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: false.
num_res_blocks: Number of residual blocks per scale. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: '3'.
num_middle_res_blocks: Number of residual blocks in the middle of the UNet. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 2.
num_heads: Number of attention heads for downsampling and middle blocks. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 4.
num_heads_upsample: Number of attention heads for upsampling. TYPE: positive integer or -1 (same as num_heads). DEFAULT: -1.
num_channels: Base channel number. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 64.
attention_resolutions: Resolutions to perform attention on. TYPE: comma separated list of integers representing idx with -1 being the deepest resolution. DEFAULT: '-2,-1'.
image_size: Image resolution. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 128.
deeper_net: Should a deeper net be used? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: false.
diff_channels: Maximum number of diff channels, giving 2^diff_channels max labels in image. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 6.
encoding_type: Which encoding type to use for the model? TYPE: One of ['analog_bits','onehot','RGB']. DEFAULT: 'analog_bits'.
final_activation: Activation function to apply once as the final layer inn the network. One of ['tanh','softmax','none','tanh_if_x']. TYPE: string. DEFAULT: 'tanh_if_x'.

p_image: Probability of image being given as input. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 0.95.
p_self_cond: Probability of self conditioning being used. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 0.0.

loss_weights: Which loss weights function to use? TYPE: One of ['uniform','SNR','SNR_plus1','SNR_trunc','gamma']. DEFAULT: 'sigmoid_-4'.
loss_type: Which loss type to use? TYPE: One of ['mse','ce1','ce2']. DEFAULT: 'mse'.
decouple_loss_weights: Should the loss weights be decoupled noise schedule? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
betas: Adam betas. TYPE: comma separated list of floats. DEFAULT: '0.9,0.999'.
min_label_size: Minimum relative label mask size in relation to the image. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 0.0.
max_iter: Maximum number of training iterations. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 300000.
datasets: Which datasets to use? TYPE: comma separated list of strings. DEFAULT: 'entity'.
train_batch_size: Batch size for training. positive integer. DEFAULT: 8.
vali_batch_size: Batch size for validation. negative inherents train_batch_size. positive integer. DEFAULT: -1.
lr_warmup_steps: Number of warmup steps for learning rate. TYPE: positive integer or 0 (no warmup). DEFAULT: 1000.
lr_warmup_type: Which warmup type to use? TYPE: One of ['cosine','linear']. DEFAULT: 'linear'.
lr_decay_steps: Number of steps for learning rate decay. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 50000.
lr_decay_type: Which decaying type to use? TYPE: One of ['cosine','linear']. DEFAULT: 'cosine'.
use_fp16: Should fp16 be used for memory reduction? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
fp16_scale_growth: Growth constant for fp16 loss scale when NANs are not encountered. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 0.001.
ema_rate: EMA rate for model weights. TYPE: comma separated list of floats. DEFAULT: '0.9999,'.
clip_grad_norm: Gradient clipping norm. Disabled when 0.0. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 1.0.
shuffle_zero: Should the zeroth channel (background) be shuffled? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
lap_mode: Which type of location aware palette should be used? TYPE: One of ['none','random','similar', 'different','range']. DEFAULT: 'similar'.
crop_method: Which crop method to use? TYPE: One of ['multicrop_most_border','multicrop_most_classes','full_image','sam_small','sam_big','sam_lidc64']. DEFAULT: 'sam_small'.
dl_num_workers: Number of workers for dataloader. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 4
ignore_padded: Should the border be ignored when training on images with border padding? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
padding_idx: Padding index used for the ground truth. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: -1.
imagenet_norm: Should the imagenet normalization be used? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
aug_prob_multiplier: Augmentation probability multiplier. TYPE: float. DEFAULT: 1.0.

gen_interval: Evaluate every n steps. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 5000.
gen_setups: Which sampler setups to use for evaluation? TYPE: comma separated list of strings. DEFAULT: '64x3[vali],64x3[train]'.
remove_old_plots: Should old plots be removed? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
save_ckpt_steps: Save checkpoint when reaching step number in training. TYPE: comma separated list of integers or -1 (no saving). DEFAULT: '-1,'.
resume_from_step: Resume training as if it was started at the checkpoint step. TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: false.
save_interval: Save checkpoint every n steps. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 5000.
log_vali_interval: Log validation and mean train metrics every n steps. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 1000.
log_train_metrics: Which metrics to log during all steps? TYPE: comma separated list of strings. DEFAULT: 'loss,grad_norm'.
update_loss_plot_interval: Update loss plot every n steps. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 1000.
update_forward_pass_plot_interval: Update forward pass plot every n steps. TYPE: positive integer. DEFAULT: 1000.
num_vali_batches: Number of batches to use for validation each vali_interval. TYPE: positive integer or 0 (no validation). DEFAULT: 8.
run_without_test: Should all evaluation be skipped? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: false.
save_best_ckpt: Should the best checkpoint be tracked and saved? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
best_ckpt_metric: Which metric to use for best checkpoint tracking. TYPE: string. DEFAULT: 'max_ari'.
best_ckpt_gen_setup_idx: Which gen setup idx to use for best checkpoint tracking. TYPE: integer. DEFAULT: 0.
best_ckpt_full: Should the full model (ema+training+opt) be saved for the best checkpoint? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: false.
debug_run: Should a debug run be performed? TYPE: str. DEFAULT: ''
max_training_restarts: Maximum number of restarts of training. TYPE: positive integer or 0 (no restarts). DEFAULT: 3.
skip_train_segment_metrics: Should the training segment metrics be skipped for speed? TYPE: boolean. DEFAULT: true.
